title: glandularia sulphurea var. pedunculata
intro: Glandularia sulphurea var. pedunculata, also known as a type of flowering plant belonging to the verbena family, is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and a woody stem. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glandularia sulphurea var. pedunculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
